"D:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\rer_test.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\rer_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\rer_test.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\rer_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o E:\CascadingPool\bin\rer_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,E:\CascadingPool\bin\librer_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\rer_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
